NetSparkleUpdater.​Samples.​Avalonia.​OSAppCastFilter
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAppCastFilter
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​Samples.​Avalonia.​OSAppCastFilter

Basic  implementation for filtering your app cast items based on a channel name (e.g. "beta"). Makes it easy to allow your users to be on a beta software track or similar.  Note that a "stable" channel search string will not be interpreted as versions like "1.0.0"; it will look for versions like "1.0.0-stable1" (aka search for the string "stable").  Names are compared in a case-insensitive manner.
